title: README.md: no mention of proxy/Tor support
description: README.md has no mention of the --proxy flag, SOCKS5 support, or Tor usage, despite this being a privacy-focused product. Users would not know proxy/Tor support exists. Fix: add a bullet or section noting --proxy socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050 for Tor and the socks5h vs socks5 DNS distinction for .onion addresses.
